Features

🚀 Game Booster Mode

📊 Live System Monitor

About CIVIX BOOSTER

CIVIX BOOSTER is a powerful PC optimization tool designed for gamers and performance enthusiasts. It helps improve system responsiveness, clean unnecessary files, and optimize your PC for maximum performance. With a single click, users can activate game boost mode, which reduces background processes, enhances system speed, and improves gaming performance. The built-in system monitor provides real-time statistics of CPU, RAM, and disk usage, allowing users to track their system performance live. The temp cleaner safely removes junk files and frees up storage space. CIVIX BOOSTER is built with a modern gaming-style interface, ensuring both performance and aesthetics.
